notes: v1.0.2 — one-click in-app updates with a redesigned prompt; copy your Minecraft settings into new instances; Optimized Launch now really applies the G1GC flags; shaderpacks activate in-game; fixed uninstaller; correct version in About. Plus the 1.0.1 fixes: accurate mod-conflict scanner, Settings scrolling, localized instance menu & Edit dialog, clearer Microsoft sign-in.
